---
output:
  html_document:
    theme: yeti
    highlight: tango
---

_______________________________________________________________________________________

![](C:/Users/reidh/Documents/GitHub/rhaefer.github.io/images/hood.jpg)

_Approaching the Pearly Gates on Mount Hood (2016)_

______________________________________________________________________________________

<a href='https://photos.google.com/share/AF1QipO_nL65SQkgSheL6hX_6WBmFYuf3QdJ8bS-DugQo9W6fhgrq4XUAuNsAUriDZdVnw?key=eE95TjlLLVRnTkhCdzU5RGhuMk5DR2JtM19hSkxn&source=ctrlq.org'><img src='https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/DGwzlU7ptqL6tNBrXmnj2o8a6y84UB1ukYzxpn34q1jKZ5RdRp-ejourAs_rHBszoLNB6RyWVeliINW-rlkOfnQOsmp5xBuNL0N9Pn6BbPG6xi1-gm-YfdZbcaoRfoRcUtmjn785Jg=w2400' /></a>


_Monserrat, Spain (April, 2018)_
